name: Lemon Popcorn
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large heavy pot, heat the corn oil over high heat until it smokes.
2. Add 1 kernel of popping corn and heat until it pops.
3. Add the rest of the popping corn to the pot, cover, and shake gently until the corn starts to pop.
4. Shake the pot vigorously until the popping slows down.
5. Remove from heat.
6. Mix lemon juice with melted butter in a separate bowl.
7. Toss the popcorn with lemon zest, salt, and the mixture of butter and lemon juice.
